# Title: Agentic Markup Pro
# Description: Official marketing site and documentation for Agentic Markup Pro, a WordPress plugin for AI Content Structuring and LLMO.

[About the Software]
Agentic Markup Pro creates a high-speed REST API pipeline to serve structured JSON-LD Knowledge Graphs directly to AI agents, bypassing messy frontend HTML. It supports standard posts, WooCommerce, and Advanced Custom Fields (ACF).

[Data Feeds]
- Knowledge Graph Feed: https://agenticmarkup.com/feed.json
- Format: application/json

[Important Links]
- Official Website: https://agenticmarkup.com
- WordPress Free Version: https://wordpress.org/plugins/agentic-markup
